education.title: Women's Literacy Program
education.desc: Adult literacy classes for women who missed out on formal education, empowering them with reading and writing skills.

education.title: Child Education Support
education.desc: Supporting children's education through school fee assistance, supplies, and after-school programs.

education.title: Vocational Training
education.desc: Practical skills training in various trades to help women gain employment or start their own businesses.

education.title: Digital Literacy
education.desc: Technology training to help women gain essential digital skills for the modern workplace and economy.

healthcare.title: Maternal Health
healthcare.desc: Prenatal care, safe delivery support, and postnatal care for mothers and newborns.

healthcare.title: HIV/AIDS Support
healthcare.desc: Testing, treatment support, and counseling for women and families affected by HIV/AIDS.

healthcare.title: Nutrition Programs
healthcare.desc: Addressing malnutrition through education, supplemental feeding, and agricultural support for families.

economic.title: Savings Groups (VSLA)
economic.desc: Community savings and loan groups to help women access capital and build financial security.

economic.title: Women's Cooperatives
economic.desc: Supporting the formation of women's cooperatives for collective economic empowerment and growth.

economic.title: Market Access
economic.desc: Helping women entrepreneurs connect to markets for their products and services globally.

economic.title: Leadership Training
economic.desc: Empowering women with leadership skills to take active roles in their communities and workplaces.
